name: Can You Make It man
short_description: A thrilling 3D platformer where you climb Mighty Oak Mountain, overcoming tricky obstacles in a stunning wooden block world. Jump, climb, and fly your way to the top to meet the Oak King. Master precise controls, collect hidden teddy bears, and test your skills in this exciting adventure!
detailed_description:
About

Embark on an exciting challenge as you ascend Mighty Oak Mountain in this 3D platformer. Get ready to face tough obstacles, jumping, climbing, and flying your way through a visually impressive world made of wooden blocks. Your goal? Reach the top to meet the Oak King. Show off your skills, courage, and determination in this thrilling adventure. Can you conquer the mountain and become a true champion? The decision is yours.

Key Features:

  • Easy to Play, Hard to Put Down: Enjoy a captivating game with simple mechanics that's both fun and challenging.

  • Exciting Climbing Adventure: Take on tricky obstacles as you make your way up each level of the wooden block mountain.

  • Precise Controls: Use timing, quick reflexes, and smart decisions to tackle increasingly tough challenges.

  • Beautiful Design: Immerse yourself in a stunning world with charming wooden block-style visuals.

  • Collect Hidden Teddy Bears: Find wooden teddy bears along the way to unlock surprises and extra content.

  • Fun Climbing Moves: Experience rhythmic and precise movements that make climbing a blast.

  • Feel Accomplished: Enjoy the satisfaction of reaching new heights and the excitement of what's next.

  • Challenge at Your Pace: Progress through levels that get harder as you go, requiring focus and determination.

  • Relaxing Vibes: Enjoy the peaceful atmosphere of the wooden block mountain.

  • Test Your Limits: Push your climbing skills, overcome obstacles, and strive for greatness in this exciting adventure.

Important Notes:

  • Controls: Menus require a keyboard, but you can use a controller for gameplay. On Mac, full keyboard control is available, but on PC, crouching only works with a controller, so a controller is highly recommended.

  • Controllers: 

    • Xbox controllers only work properly on PC.

    • PlayStation controllers function specifically on Mac.

  • Final Build: Due to unforeseen events, the main project file was lost, so this version cannot be updated. However, we plan to rebuild and update the game in the future once we see more traction!

    🔹 Legendary Gold Spring 🔹

    These special sprigs help you skip sections of the level! You’ll know one is nearby when you see a glowing blue light. Simply jump near the light, and you'll be launched into the air! 🚀✨

    • Level 2: Look near the end of the orange up-blocks.

    • Level 3: Hidden behind the back wall of the final section (green block jumps).

    Use them wisely, and keep climbing! ⛰️🔥
